Memory
Everything Magellan has learned about your business — and exactly where it learned it.

Only derived facts are stored — never screenshots, passwords, or raw platform data
M
Learned this week3 new
You’ve decided to consolidate Kunming freight into twice-weekly batches to cut shipping cost.
DecisionYou told me· today, from “Where's the money leaking?”Forgotten
The new cake line runs at 54% margin — above your store average, even with imported saffron and chocolate.
FactDerived from 30 days of orders· 2 days agoForgotten
Shipping is your single biggest margin leak — running at 9% of revenue and climbing.
FactDerived from 90 days· 3 days agoForgotten
Factswhat's true about the business
COGS sits at 48% and has held steady for six months.
Confirmed from cost + order data· reconciled weeklyForgotten
Kunming air freight takes 4 days door-to-cold-storage.
You told me· JanuaryForgotten
Average order value is $1,840.
Confirmed from WooCommerce· liveForgotten
Hydrangeas sell ~13 stems/day, rising to ~16 during wedding weeks.
Derived from order history· updated dailyForgotten
Preferenceshow you like things done
Never discount— it’s brand-damaging. Use a complimentary gift instead.
You told me· February · applied 14 timesForgotten
All prices end in 90.
You told me· house ruleForgotten
Thai copy always gets a native-speaker review before it ships.
You told me· JanuaryForgotten
Decisionswhat you chose, and why
Switched the welcome flow to lead with the craft story, not a discount.
You decided· because discounting conflicts with the brandForgotten
Finance is tracked ledger-based — no bank integration, no screenshots.
You decided· for privacy and controlForgotten
Peoplewho does what
Alice runs operations and is the primary dispatch user.

Nono is head florist and reviews Thai floral copy.
